fca_field_name: Transmitting firm identification code for the seller
repeating_logic: 20-character LEI; required when field 25=true and seller transmits.
Date and time transaction executed; min precision = seconds.
DEAL=own account, MTCH=matched principal, AOTC=other.
Number of units or monetary/nominal value; max 18 digits (5 or 17 fraction).
3-letter currency code; mandatory if field 30 is monetary/nominal value.
Indicator for derivative notional changes; INCR or DECR only.
Traded price excluding commission/accrued interest; can be PNDG (pending) or NOAP (not applicable).
3-letter currency code; mandatory if field 33 is monetary value.
Calculated settlement amount; max 18 digits (5 fraction).
4-character Market Identifier Code; XOFF for off-venue, XXXX for non-traded underlying.
2-letter country code of executing firm's branch or head office.
Monetary value of up-front payment; positive=seller receives, negative=seller pays.
3-letter currency code; mandatory if field 38 populated.
Internal firm identifier for combination transactions; max 35 chars, capital letters and numbers.
12-character ISIN code; mandatory for venue-traded or SI transactions.
Full name of instrument; max 350 chars; mandatory for OTC non-FIRDS instruments.
6-character CFI code; mandatory for OTC non-FIRDS instruments.
3-letter currency code for notional (leg 1 of derivatives); optional for non-FIRDS.
3-letter currency code for leg 2 (multi-currency swaps); optional for non-FIRDS.
Units of underlying per contract (futures/options/index); max 18 digits (17 fraction). Mandatory for non-FIRDS derivatives.
PARALLEL
notes: Pipe-delimited: ISIN|ISIN|... for basket constituents. GROUP ANCHOR: UNDERLYING_GROUP ends after field 47.

repeating_logic: Name of index (if underlying is index); predefined list or custom name (max 25 chars).
Term of index (value + unit); e.g., '3MNTH' for 3 months.
PUTO=put/floor, CALL=call/cap, OTHR=indeterminable; optional for non-FIRDS options.
Predetermined exercise price; can be PNDG (pending); optional for non-FIRDS options.
3-letter currency code; mandatory if field 51 is monetary value.

content_type: EURO or AMER or ASIA or BERM or OTHR
repeating_logic: Exercise style: European, American, Asian, Bermudan, or other; optional for non-FIRDS.
Debt instrument maturity date; optional for non-FIRDS.
Derivative contract expiry date; optional for non-FIRDS.
Settlement method: PHYS=physical, CASH=cash, OPTL=optional/indeterminable. Mandatory for non-FIRDS derivatives.
Natural person ID (max 35 chars) or algorithm ID (max 50 chars capital letters/numbers).

Natural person ID (max 35 chars), algorithm ID (max 50 chars), or 'CLIENT'.
